debug: always-visible test/diag button for push notifications

- Speaker icon now always visible (not gated on bell state)
- Tapping it shows diagnostic toast: SW support, Push support,

- Then calls /push/test and shows server result
- Helps identify exactly where in the pipeline it's breaking

commit.message:
feat: add FlareSolverr for CF bypass on GitHub Actions

ZeroZero gets HTTP 403 on Actions datacenter IPs — curl_cffi TLS
fingerprinting alone can't bypass Cloudflare when the IP is flagged.

Solution: 3-strategy CF bypass in create_cf_session():
  1. Direct curl_cffi (works locally with clean IPs)
  2. FlareSolverr cookies + curl_cffi (fast: solve once, reuse cookies)
  3. FlareSolverr session mode (slower but reliable: each request
     goes through undetected Chrome)

FlareSolverr runs as a Docker service container in the Actions
workflow. It uses undetected Chrome to solve CF challenges that
curl_cffi cannot handle.

Also:
- Remove playwright from requirements (no longer used)
- Add diagnostic logging (curl_cffi version, strategy selection)
- Reduce request volume in FlareSolverr mode for time budget
- Cleanup FlareSolverr session on exit

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Replace cahokia/web/bundle.sh with cast publish (#425)

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: make reference doc parameters searchable by name (#10)

* Initial plan

* fix: make reference doc parameter names searchable in site search

- Add data-search-children={true} to Parameters component outer div
  so the lunr-search traversal recurses into it to find headings
- Change parameter headings from h4 (####) to h3 (###) so they match
  the ['h2','h3'] heading test in docusaurus-lunr-search and become
  separate searchable section entries with their anchor links
- Add toc_max_heading_level: 2 to generated reference page frontmatter
  to prevent the h3 parameter headings from cluttering the TOC

commit.message:
feat(#35): add session.scope agent and workflow step (#44)

* feat(#35): add session.scope agent and workflow step

Add the scope agent as a formal workflow step between start and spec/plan.
The scope agent defines problem boundaries and success criteria through
an interactive dialogue before any planning begins.

Deliverables:
- github/agents/session.scope.agent.md: dialogue-driven scope definition
- github/prompts/session.scope.prompt.md: prompt link file
- install.sh + update.sh: include scope agent/prompt in install arrays
- session.start.agent.md: handoff to scope instead of plan for dev/spike
- session.plan.agent.md: check for scope.md as input context

The scope agent:
- Produces {session_dir}/scope.md with problem statement, in/out scope,
  success criteria, constraints, and open questions
- Is interactive: asks up to 5 clarifying questions one at a time
- Uses brainstorm.md as input context when available
- Acts as the first human review gate before proceeding

Transitions (from #38): start → scope, brainstorm → scope,
scope → spec (dev), scope → plan (spike)

Closes #35

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address Copilot review comments on scope agent

- Use $SESSION_DIR variable in plan.md scope check for consistency
- Use bullet-link format for scope.md path in notes.md reference

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: TEMAZOS ROOMS v9 — NOVA complete rewrite

- Fix name input bug: nameInputDirty flag prevents localStorage from
  overwriting user-typed name when arriving via ?room= shared link
- Fix round cleanup: nextRoundStep() now uses atomic multi-path update()
  with complete currentRound object replacement (clears answers/results)
- Fix moderator panel: gradient/border/glow CSS applied to #moderator-panel
- All 6 genre song lists: POP, ROCK, HIP-HOP, LATINO, DANCE, ESPAÑA
- Full game flow: lobby→round phases→reveal→winner/tiebreak
- Firebase RTDB + Anonymous Auth via CDN gstatic v10.12.5
- QR code, share, toast notifications, modals, score adjustments
- Version v9 — NOVA displayed on home, lobby, and page title

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix file stuttering naming violations

Renamed 10 files to follow Go naming conventions and eliminate package/file
name stuttering:

1. displaylist/displaylist.go → displaylist/commands.go
2. text/text.go → text/render.go
3. widgets/widgets.go → widgets/base.go
4. backend/backend.go → backend/gpu.go
5. effects/effects.go → effects/visual.go
6. atlas/atlas.go → atlas/texture.go
7. composite/composite.go → composite/ops.go
8. curves/curves.go → curves/bezier.go
9. scale/scale.go → scale/manager.go
10. layout/layout.go → layout/flex.go

All files renamed with git mv to preserve history. Zero code changes, only
file path updates. All tests pass.

Completes AUDIT.md Phase 2 naming task.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Restore enter submit behavior

fix: narration DTO field names and update Gemini model

- Rename SetFeaturedImageRequest fields Prompt/Narration to ImagePrompt/ImageNarration to match frontend payload
- Update Gemini model from deprecated gemini-2.5-flash-preview-image-generation to gemini-2.5-flash-image

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: robust push notifications with test button and full logging

- Add test notification button (speaker icon, visible when bell is active)
  Calls /push/test which fires an immediate push and reports success/failure
- /push/test endpoint shows exactly how many subs were found and sent
- Full [PUSH] logging in server so Render logs show every step
- Auto-remove stale 410/404 subscriptions from DB
- tryPushSubscribe(force): only resubscribes when forced (bell tap)
  not on every page load — prevents endpoint churn
- _notify_other_devices runs as BackgroundTask (non-blocking)
- All client errors now surfaced as toasts instead of silent catch

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Clean stale VAE references from config.yaml and config_loader.py

- Update resolution schedule comment (VAE latents → pixels)
- Update perceptual loss section (remove VAE decode references, crop_size 32→256)
- Remove vae_path from PathConfig

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix 3 bugs: nameInputDirty flag, nextRoundStep set() cleanup, moderator panel CSS

- Bug 1: Add nameInputDirty boolean flag; only auto-fill player name
  from localStorage when nameInputDirty === false, preventing stored
  name from overwriting user input on shared ?room= links.
- Bug 2: nextRoundStep() now calls set() to completely replace
  currentRound in Firebase instead of update(), ensuring answers/
  results from prior rounds are fully cleared.
- Bug 3: #moderator-panel CSS now includes explicit border-radius:8px,
  padding:16px, margin-top:16px alongside the existing gradient/border.
- Update LS_KEY to 'temazos_v9_nova' with migration from old key so
  existing users keep their saved name and last room code.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: 將 App.svelte script 邏輯抽離至 TS 模組並修正型別衝突

變更摘要：

- App.svelte：將 reactive watch 邏輯（課堂偵測、學號同步、預覽資料建構）
  移出 <script> 區塊，改由 watch.ts 模組統一管理，降低元件複雜度
- watch.ts：新增 setupWatchers() 作為 App 層級的 reactive 調度器，
  負責 startClass / stopClass 失敗時略過後續 watch、URL/domain
  不洩漏至前端、以及 preview 安全策略的一致維護
- validation.ts：修正 ValidatedForm 與 RequestPayload 之間的 type
  衝突（optional vs required 欄位不匹配），確保 buildPayload 回傳
  型別與下游 API 呼叫一致
- buildRequestPreviewData 移除不必要的 buildPayload DI 參數，
  改為內部直接引用已驗證的 payload，減少函式簽名耦合

行為維持：
  · start 失敗時自動略過 watch 排程，不產生殘留 timer
  · URL / domain 資訊不暴露至前端 log 或 UI
  · preview 安全策略（sanitize + escape）保持不變

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: centralize __global__ group ID + add --global indexing flag

- Add build_group_ids() helper to config.py to eliminate 40+ repeated
  patterns of [group_id, "__global__"] conditional construction
- Replace all hardcoded "__global__" strings across 18 files with
  settings.GLOBAL_GROUP_ID or build_group_ids(group_id)
- Add --global flag to index_5pdfs_v2_local.py for indexing under the
  global group (visible to all authenticated users)
- Files: config, orchestrator, 7 routes, 5 pipeline modules,
  2 retrievers, 2 neo4j services

refactor: improve naming conventions by renaming single-letter variables

Renamed single-letter variables to more descriptive names to improve code
readability and reduce naming violations:

- Renamed 'h' to 'header' in wire protocol decoders (4 instances)
  - internal/wayland/wire/wire.go: DecodeHeader function
  - internal/x11/wire/wire.go: DecodeReplyHeader, DecodeEventHeader,
    DecodeErrorHeader functions

- Renamed 'x'/'y' to 'windowX'/'windowY' in window setup constants (12 instances)
  - cmd/amd-triangle-demo/main.go: setupX11Window
  - cmd/gpu-display-demo/main.go: createX11Window
  - cmd/gpu-triangle-demo/main.go: setupX11Window
  - cmd/x11-dmabuf-demo/main.go: setupX11Context
  - internal/demo/x11setup.go: RunX11Demo, ConnectAndSetupX11Window

Impact:
- Reduced identifier naming violations from 44 to 28 (36% improvement)
- Improved code clarity for wire protocol handling
- Better readability in window initialization code

commit.message:
fix(deps): patch serialize-javascript vulnerability (GHSA-5c6j-r48x-rmvq) (#134)

## Summary

Fixes **GHSA-5c6j-r48x-rmvq** — a code injection vulnerability in
`serialize-javascript` ≤ 7.0.2.

## Details

`serialize-javascript@6.0.2` was a transitive dependency in the frontend
build via:
```
vite-plugin-pwa → workbox-build → @rollup/plugin-terser → serialize-javascript@6.0.2
```

Since `workbox-build@latest` still pins `@rollup/plugin-terser@^0.4.x`
(which uses `serialize-javascript@^6`), an npm override is used in
`src/frontend/package.json` to force the patched version.

**Updated:** `serialize-javascript` 6.0.2 → 7.0.4

## Verification

- ✅ Frontend build succeeds
- ✅ All 575 tests pass
- ✅ Resolves Scorecard code-scanning alert #32

## Risk

Low — `serialize-javascript` is only used at build time (Rollup/Terser
minification), not at runtime. The override forces a major version bump
(6→7) but the API is compatible for this use case.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

## Validation

Windows (both net11.0 and net481 TFMs).

fix: remove 7 broken câmaras (404/timeout) saving ~3.5min per run

Removed: Guimarães, Viana do Castelo, Vila Real, Bragança,
Castelo Branco, Guarda, Santarém. All consistently return
HTTP 404 or connection timeout across every Actions run.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: eliminate CLS layout shifts from SPA activation and fixed elements (#1355) (#1357)

Root cause: SPA activation used display:none to hide SSR content, causing
a full layout recalculation (CLS 0.34-0.998). The VNext shell also lacked
the bm-content class, creating inconsistent min-height behaviour.

Fixes:
- site.css: Add .bm-ssr-hidden class (visibility:hidden + position:absolute)
  that removes content from visual flow without triggering layout shift.
  Add contain:layout style to .bm-navbar, .bm-content, .bm-footer to
  isolate paint/layout recalculations.
- vnext-app.js: SPA activation now uses classList.add('bm-ssr-hidden')
  instead of style.display='none'.
- RouteRegistrationExtensions.cs: VNext shell div#vnext-content now
  includes bm-content class and matching py-4 px-4 padding.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
